what_it_does: Records a raised decision signal that the operator selected the 'Let it propose refinements — you accept each' option for the card-refine-posture decision, and states that gated work may resume under that option.
observations: The file is a noticeboard item of type signal with state raised
Its source is claude_code and author_session is operator
It links via attached_to to decision://global/card-refine-posture
The title and body both name the chosen option for card-refine-posture
It explicitly says work gated on that decision can RESUME with this option
Created and updated timestamps are identical and a single history entry records the 'filed' transition
standouts: It is a decision.decided signal for decision://global/card-refine-posture
The chosen option delegates refinement proposal authority but requires per-item operator acceptance
Resume of gated work is framed as the lane's/operator's next gated step
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, state, links, timestamps, and history
Uses board:// and decision:// URI identifiers
Markdown body restates the decision in plain language
notes: A noticeboard signal that a global decision has been decided and that dependent gated work can resume.
questions: What specific work is gated on decision://global/card-refine-posture?
What mechanism will present proposed refinements for individual acceptance?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record and broadcast the decided option for card-refine-posture; the file does exactly that and adds the resume instruction.
intention_signals: It tries to close an open decision by capturing the chosen option and signaling downstream lanes that they may proceed with that option in effect.
novelty: It treats a human acceptance pattern ('you accept each') as a first-class decision option that gates resumption, rather than a blanket approval.
contribution: It preserves the exact decided option and the resume condition for the card-refine-posture decision, giving a fused system a precise, timestamped signal of when and how to proceed.
summary_for_embedding: A raised noticeboard signal recording the operator's decision to choose the 'let it propose refinements — you accept each' option for card-refine-posture and stating that gated work may resume.
intention_for_embedding: To broadcast the resolved decision option and unblock dependent work that was waiting on card-refine-posture.
